dsFHStatus._queryString: @[{.tel.vsFhStatus[]}; ::; {([] error: enlist "System not running. Please start application first.")}]

parseTrade._queryString: {[selectedSymforFH] select bucket, parseUs_p95 from telemetry_latency_fh where handler=`trade_fh, sym in selectedSymforFH, bucket>.z.p-00:10:00}

sendTrade._queryString: {[selectedSymforFH] select bucket, sendUs_p95 from telemetry_latency_fh where handler=`trade_fh, sym in selectedSymforFH, bucket>.z.p-00:10:00}

parseQuote._queryString: {[selectedSymforFH] select bucket, parseUs_p95 from telemetry_latency_fh where handler=`quote_fh, sym in selectedSymforFH, bucket>.z.p-00:10:00}

sendQuote._queryString: {[selectedSymforFH] select bucket, sendUs_p95 from telemetry_latency_fh where handler=`quote_fh, sym in selectedSymforFH, bucket>.z.p-00:10:00}
